backend/main.mo: Actor includes blob-storage mixin for storage behavior.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file mapping frontend file paths to descriptive summaries of their components and hooks.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base styles defining OKLCH variables for light and dark themes.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML shell mounting React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component assembling providers, layout, and player overlay.
frontend/src/components/AppErrorBoundary: React error boundary that displays a styled fallback UI and reload option.
frontend/src/components/BackgroundAmbian: Popup for selecting background ambiance with dynamic positioning and theme-aware styling.
frontend/src/components/DurationSelector: Theme-adaptive popup for selecting session duration via slider with escape and click-outside handling.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Minimal footer with blurred dark background and no content.
frontend/src/components/FrequencyCard.ts: Displays a frequency card with play/stop controls and an add‑to‑playlist button, managing temporary checkmark UI state.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Renders the app header with theme, language, and ambiance selectors, dynamically styling buttons based on the current theme.
frontend/src/components/KidsSleepSoundCa: Displays a kids' sleep sound card with localized title, play controls, and playlist handling similar to FrequencyCard.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSelector: Shows a position-aware language selection popup, adapting layout to viewport and theme, and allowing users to change language.
frontend/src/components/MainPlayer.tsx: Implements the main audio player with playback controls, duration and playlist popups, theming, and dynamic item name resolution.
frontend/src/components/MoodSpace.tsx: Provides a mood selection interface that highlights the chosen mood and displays recommended sounds based on that selection.
frontend/src/components/PeacefulSoundCar: UI card for a peaceful sound with play/stop control and optional add-to-playlist feedback logic.
frontend/src/components/PlayerAnimationO: Full-screen canvas overlay rendering animated particle and ring visuals synchronized to the current sound or frequency.
frontend/src/components/PlaylistPopup.ts: Popup panel displaying and managing the active playlist with theming, reordering, removal, and playback controls.
frontend/src/components/RecommendedSound: Renders recommended sounds or frequencies with play, session start, and add-to-playlist actions plus temporary feedback state.
frontend/src/components/SoundWaveVisuali: Full‑screen canvas visualization drawing animated rings and particles based on the current frequency or sound.
Renders a themed background with image, animated gradient, and audio‑reactive pulse overlay based on current theme and intensity.
frontend/src/components/ThemeSelector.ts: Empty file or placeholder with no content provided.
frontend/src/components/ThemeSelectorPop: Displays a popup for selecting visual themes, positioning itself dynamically under the theme button and supporting i18n labels.
frontend/src/components/UnifiedFrequency: Lists frequencies and sound categories, handles playback toggling, and applies theme‑specific gradients and glow styles.
frontend/src/components/UnifiedPlaylistP: Empty file or placeholder with no content provided.
frontend/src/components/UnifiedSessionPa: Shows active session details with progress, controls, and predefined session start buttons using player and i18n data.
frontend/src/hooks/UnifiedAudioManagerCo: Provides a context syncing main player state to the unified audio manager and exposes audio control functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor, refetching dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioActivation.ts: Manages unlocking the Web Audio API on first user interaction and shows a brief visual activation indicator.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioManager.ts: File is empty or contains no provided content.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackgroundAmbiance: Provides context and logic for playing looping ambient background audio with fade-in, persistence, and integration with the main player.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements a context provider and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, stored-identity restoration, and status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useLanguage.tsx: Manages app language selection with localStorage persistence and exposes translations through context.
frontend/src/hooks/useMainPlayer.tsx: Core audio player state and controls, handling frequencies, sounds, queues, timers, and playback modes.
frontend/src/hooks/useMainPlayerAudioSyn: Empty placeholder hook for future audio synchronization logic.
frontend/src/hooks/usePlaylistManager.ts: Empty placeholder hook for playlist management.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Stub file indicating no backend queries are required.
frontend/src/hooks/useSessionManager.ts: Empty placeholder hook for session management.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.tsx: Provides context for selecting and persisting visual themes using localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useUnifiedAudioManage: Unified Web Audio and native Android audio handler supporting frequency playback, sound playback, intensity monitoring, and native bridge integration.
frontend/src/hooks/useUnifiedPlaylistMan: Manages playlist creation, modification, and playback synchronization with the main player, including frequency and sound items.
frontend/src/hooks/useUnifiedSessionMana: Manages meditation sessions by coordinating frequency queues, timers, and player controls for start, pause, resume, and stop.
frontend/src/hooks/useVisualization.tsx: Provides a context for fullscreen visualization state with toggle and persistence helpers.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind layers and custom CSS variables for light/dark themes plus utility and animation classes.
frontend/src/lib/androidAudioBridge.ts: Wraps Android WebView audio bridge calls with availability checks and safe play/stop helpers.
frontend/src/lib/androidNativeSoundId.ts: Maps web sound IDs to Android native resource IDs using explicit mappings or normalized fallbacks.
frontend/src/lib/kidsSleepSounds.ts: Exports metadata for categorized kids sleep sound items used in the UI.
frontend/src/lib/meditationAnimationMapp: Maps frequencies and sound IDs to animation types and returns detailed animation configuration.
frontend/src/lib/moodRecommendations.ts: Defines recommended frequencies and sounds for each mood type.
frontend/src/lib/moods.ts: Declares mood types with associated icons and glow colors for UI display.
frontend/src/lib/peacefulSounds.ts: Defines a PeacefulSound interface and exports a list of peaceful sound IDs and titles.
frontend/src/lib/translations.ts: Defines language types, translation structures, available languages, and a translations record with localized UI strings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider and renders the root component.
frontend/src/startupDiagnostics.ts: Empty placeholder file for startup diagnostics.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind CSS with dark mode, custom colors, animations, screens, and plugins.
project_state.json: Metadata describing project state, versioning, issues, and settings for deployment retries.
